name: Fall Out Boy - Create Your Own
description:
Same code as my other Fall Out Boy bot, but this is made for you to create your own scenario, as such a bot didn't exist yet.

Occasionally updating as I learn how to make bots better and stop talking for the user. If the bot does talk for you, I recommend putting one of the following in the chat memory, advanced prompt, or the end of your message:

[Do not reiterate what I wrote.]

[Do not reiterate what {{user}} wrote. Continue dialog.]

[(Permanent): Never act, think, or speak for {{user}}. Always have {{char}} act, think, or speak.]

Notes: Tweaked personalities to be more realistic.

Tags: Pete Wentz, Patrick Stump, Joe Trohman, Andy Hurley, FOB
creator: Dawnian
